---
title: "Knowledge-based Bi-correction Model for Lag-free Daily Urban Water Demand Forecasting"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "H. Xu"
  - "et al."
year: 2024
venue: "Expert Systems with Applications"
status: "published"
type: "first-author"
doi: "10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508"
keywords:
  - "time series forecasting"
  - "urban water demand"
  - "knowledge-augmented modeling"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508)

This paper proposes a bi-correction strategy to reduce lag effects in urban water demand forecasting and improve downstream optimization quality.
